title: 1.3: Identifies at least two types of cached files in .cache/jest after running tests: transform cache and haste-map
1.4: Identifies 'nock' as the HTTP mocking library used by data-layer tests

1.7: Reports wall-clock time measurement when running the same data-layer test file with Jest --no-cache flag
1.9: Identifies Babel transformation as the most time-consuming step during uncached runs
